message:
test(proptest): add 28 property-based tests for tx_plan_compiler

Comprehensive proptest coverage for compile_tx_plan() DAG compiler:
- Topological sort validity and determinism (3 tests)
- Parallel level dependency respect, independent sharing, linear chain depth (3)
- Risk classification: critical/destructive tags, score monotonicity (3)
- Risk summary counts and uncompensated step tracking (2)
- External dependency rejection to rejected_edges (2)
- Precondition injection: policy preflight, context freshness (3)
- Compensation injection: auto-compensation for high/critical risk (2)
- Serde roundtrip: TxPlan, CompilerConfig, PreconditionKind (3)
- Deterministic hash computation and uniqueness (2)
- Boundary/edge cases: fan-out/fan-in DAGs, empty plan, threshold (5)

All 28 pass, zero clippy warnings (subprocess-bridge feature).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
